title: NBRC Research Associate-I Vacancy 2026, Apply Now , Free Form PDF -
short_info: NBRC Research Associate-I Vacancy 2026: National Brain Research Centre (NBRC) has issued a notification for the position of Research Associate-I. The recruitment drive comprises one vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 10-06-2026+, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the NBRC Research Associate-I Vacancy 2026 recruitment is provided below.
